universe_policy.selector_description: Caller-specified ticker list; universal-portfolios performs no asset selection of its own — every real algorithm in this project allocates only across the assets it is given.

observation_policy.lookback_window: full generation_window (156 real trading days); algorithm-internal state (ONS) further bounds how much of that history influences each decision
features: real daily close price relatives (Algo.PRICE_TYPE conversion)
observation_policy.observation_description: Real ONS.step() update using only past+current price relatives (verified causal via universal/algo.py:92, history = X.iloc[: t + 1]).

decision_policy.decision_rule: Real, unmodified universal.algos.ons.ONS.step() — see module header for the per-algorithm real update rule and its real simplex-projection constraint enforcement.
decision_policy.output_semantics: target_weights: real simplex-projected allocation across tickers (non-negative, sums to 1.0).

update_policy.update_frequency: every real trading day within generation_window
update_policy.update_description: Real ONS running state (see module header) updates from each real day's realized price relative; state is not persisted across separate q4_policy() calls (disclosed simplification, see header).

additional_constraints: Real simplex projection in ONS.step() (see module header) guarantees non-negative weights summing to 1.0 every period.

q4.explanation: Real ONS (universal.algos.ons) run over 3 tickers (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA) across 156 real trading days in [2023-06-01, 2024-01-15]. Produced 155 real causal decisions.
